fetchNotes.loop: Special:EntityData/<QID>.json per entity with a qid — NEVER SPARQL in the 6-hourly loop (OM §5.1)

fetchNotes.endpointRule: event older than 5 days → archive API (start_date/end_date); within the lag window → forecast API with past_days=7 (past_days is NOT an archive-API parameter — deviation §13.3)
fetchNotes.rateCap: 5000/day free tier — backfill batches one archive call per event window

fetchNotes.crosswalkOnly: ingests EXACTLY the markets in registry/crosswalk/polymarket.json — runtime title matching is forbidden (§1.6)
fetchNotes.fidelity: ALWAYS set on /prices-history; closed markets need fidelity=1440 or the API silently returns {"history":[]}

fetchNotes.role: fallback venue geocoder only; unused while f1db supplies circuit coords
